customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality and appreciate its modern appearance, with one noting its touch panel with LED indicators. The product is easy to use, making daily usage simple, and customers consider it worth the price, noting it saves money in the long run. They like the smart features that add convenience, and one customer mentions the preset dispensing modes are surprisingly useful. The reliability receives mixed feedback, with some saying it works better than expected while others report it stopped working suddenly.

reviews.author: Tejaswi
reviews.title: Impressed with the M2 Pro and the Professional Installation Experience
reviews.body: I purchased the M2 Pro during an offer, and after using it for the past three days, I’m genuinely impressed with its performance. One feature I particularly love is the real-time display of the input and output water TDS levels. It gives great confidence about the quality of the water being purified and reflects the product’s advanced technology. I would also like to appreciate Mr. Mandoju Purna Chary, who handled the installation. He was highly professional, knowledgeable, and courteous throughout the process. The installation was completed quickly with proper setup, and he patiently explaine

reviews.author: manish chauhan
reviews.title: Premium Product and excellent filtration system.
reviews.body: Excellent product....water taste is excellent and RO Looks premium and pretty also. Installation experience also nice. Price also value for money...filtration process also zabardast(excellent). It takes 30-35 minutes to fill 8 ltr. tank...wastage water approx 8-10 ltr.

reviews.author: bolem kishore
reviews.title: Excellent product—pure peace of mind
reviews.body: Excellent product with great features. The water quality is top-notch, the design is sleek, and the 2-year unconditional warranty gives total peace of mind. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a hassle-free, smart RO system!

reviews.author: Jignesh mehta
reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5/5 Excellent water purifier with a premium design and smart features. The water tastes fresh and clean, and the performance has been consistently reliable. Installation was smooth, and the maintenance-free service adds great convenience. The Urban Company Native M2 Pro offers outstanding quality, innovation, and value for money. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Baishali
reviews.title: Go for it!!
reviews.body: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent product and service! The installation was smooth, and Vasanth was very professional. He explained the product clearly and completed the installation neatly. Highly recommended!
